response.overview: Mila is a cheerful young girl who always wears the same sandal, carrying it with her through life's highest highs and lowest lows. Though she smiles through it all, she finds herself unable to move forward. After consulting her therapist, she decides to go for a run. Along the way, she learns that change isn't something to fear, but something to embrace. Sometimes, the only thing standing between who you are and who you could become is a pair of shoes that no longer fit. In the end, she realizes the dog days are, indeed, over.
response.tagline: If the shoes don't fit, change it.
response.title: Dog Days
